personal.preferred_title: Software Engineer / SQL Production Support Engineer

summary: Enterprise software and data engineer with 20+ years of experience supporting application development, SQL/RDBMS scripting, production support, documentation, testing, and operational reporting in regulated environments. Strong background translating business and system requirements into maintainable code, database scripts, test scenarios, monitoring/reporting workflows, and clear technical artifacts. Interested in remote application engineering roles where disciplined SDLC execution, defect resolution, database support, and reliable production operations matter more than title level.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported Python, SQL, and reporting workflows used to monitor enterprise system health, evaluate process outcomes, and surface production exceptions for operational teams.
Created and maintained database-backed data processes, including Oracle schemas, SQL queries, validation routines, and recurring reporting outputs for capacity planning and operational analysis.
Translated stakeholder requirements into repeatable technical deliverables, including scripts, datasets, dashboards, documentation, and support procedures.
Performed production support and root-cause analysis across monitoring, reporting, and data pipeline processes, improving reliability and reducing manual follow-up.
Applied SDLC discipline through requirements clarification, design notes, testing, validation, change coordination, and post-deployment support for enterprise data workflows.
Partnered with technical and non-technical teams to explain system behavior, document risks, and deliver practical fixes under production timelines.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported business-critical web and application systems by monitoring performance, analyzing defects, and producing technical recommendations for engineering teams.
Created reporting and analysis outputs from real-user and synthetic monitoring data to help stakeholders understand application health and customer-facing performance.
Documented monitoring coverage, system behavior, and technical changes during platform upgrades and security transitions.
Worked cross-functionally with application, infrastructure, QA, and business teams to troubleshoot issues and validate operational readiness.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported enterprise application monitoring and reporting environments for a large financial-services client, including dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and production support processes.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts to extract, transform, and report operational data, replacing manual weekly exports with repeatable processes.
Collaborated with Java/J2EE, WebLogic, WebSphere, database, and infrastructure teams to diagnose application bottlenecks and production issues.
Produced technical documentation, training materials, support notes, and knowledge-transfer artifacts used by client and internal teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained C++/Oracle application and data migration components for a high-throughput transaction processing platform.
Developed database validation and test utilities using C++/OCCI/OCI and SQL to confirm correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration support tasks to reduce manual effort and improve production cutover confidence.
Applied object-oriented programming, relational database design, troubleshooting, and documentation practices across a complex enterprise system.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported telecom billing and interface applications using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Java/J2EE concepts, XML, Unix, and Korn Shell scripting.
Created and modified database scripts, reporting processes, batch jobs, and interface components used in production billing workflows.
Participated in defect resolution, QA cycles, code maintenance, production support, and technical documentation for enterprise application changes.
Worked with CVS/ClearCase, testing tools, application servers, and Unix environments while supporting structured SDLC and change-management processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Programming & Scripting: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, C, C++, Java/J2EE concepts, JavaScript awareness, Perl, Korn Shell scripting, XML, JSON
skills.Databases & RDBMS: Oracle, PL/SQL, relational database design, SQL scripting, database object support, query troubleshooting, PostgreSQL/MySQL exposure, SQL Server concepts
skills.Application Support & SDLC: Requirements analysis, technical specifications, defect troubleshooting, production support, change management, system documentation, test scenarios, release support
skills.Testing & Quality: Data validation, QA checks, unit-testing discipline, reconciliation, defect analysis, root-cause analysis, system health reporting, operational exception monitoring
skills.Reporting & Analytics: Operational reporting, data analysis, dashboard-style reporting, capacity and system health reports, stakeholder communication, Power BI concepts
skills.Tools & Delivery: Git/GitHub, CVS/ClearCase, Docker, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, JIRA concepts, Linux/Unix, Eclipse awareness, JUnit awareness

projects.name: Production Monitoring and Reporting Automation
projects.description: Built and supported Python/SQL reporting workflows that monitored operational telemetry, evaluated system health, and produced repeatable outputs for production support and stakeholder review.

projects.name: Enterprise Data Validation and Migration Utilities
projects.description: Developed database-backed validation utilities and migration support scripts to verify data correctness, automate schema/data checks, and support production cutover activities.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based workflow that produces structured JSON artifacts, quality gates, semantic duplicate checks, and tracking outputs, demonstrating practical automation and documentation discipline.
